title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
